frame_label: Other Man's Ownership > Woman's Own Consent
generated_comment: Bro, at first I thought she was just giving attitude when she said no. Later I found out she's already with someone, so obviously I backed off — no point getting involved in that.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because he dismisses the woman's own refusal as 'attitude' and only treats her as off-limits after learning she is attached to another man. It encodes the surface manifestation of ignoring direct disinterest until male ownership or relationship status is known.
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 27. A junior employee at a tech startup in Bengaluru. You are in the office cafeteria having lunch with three male colleagues after your female engineering manager just led a very strong all hands presentation. One colleague says she was impressive. You are responding and giving your actual opinion of her.
